msens 0.3.4

Compose a raw (per-dataset) model key

Source: R/mdl_key.R
mdl_key_raw.Rd

The stable id for a native, per-dataset model: {dataset_key}|{sp_id} with an optional trailing |{interval} for time-resolved models (monthly gm, seasonal nc). Vectorised over sp_id (and interval).

Usage

mdl_key_raw(dataset_key, sp_id, interval = NULL)

Arguments

dataset_key

scalar dataset key, e.g. "am", "gm", "nc", "botw"

sp_id

dataset-native species/guild id(s) (character or coercible)

interval

optional interval label(s), e.g. month "01" or season "summer"

Value

character mdl_key(s)

Examples

mdl_key_raw("am", "Fis-29291")   # "am|Fis-29291"
#> [1] "am|Fis-29291"
mdl_key_raw("gm", 1234, "01")    # "gm|1234|01"
#> [1] "gm|1234|01"
